cover_letter: I'm a self-taught full-stack developer with two years of hands-on experience building production applications end to end. I've worked extensively with TypeScript, React, and Node.js, and I recently designed and deployed a distributed system on AWS that handles over a million events per hour — so I'm comfortable with both frontend polish and backend scale. I'm looking for a team that values clean code and real growth, which is exactly what this role sounds like. I'd love the chance to contribute, ask the right questions, and keep leveling up with you all.
email_body: Hi there, I'm applying for the Junior Full Stack Developer role. I've attached my resume and links to my work. I've spent the last two years building production apps with TypeScript, React, and Node.js, and have experience shipping scalable systems on AWS. I'm excited about the chance to write clean code and grow with your team. Would love to chat about how I can contribute. Thanks!
